company.name: Galmed Pharmaceuticals
company.subtitle: Aramchol SCD1 inhibitor pivot · NASH legacy · GI onco Phase 1b early 2026 · Parkinson Ph1b/2 H2 2026 · Nasdaq bid price deficiency
company.cashRunway: Into 2027 on reduced burn post-pivot (~$5M annual)

assets.name: Aramchol — GI oncology combo (Stivarga + metformin)
assets.stage: Phase 1b early 2026 at VCU Massey (mCRC, HCC, cholangiocarcinoma)

market.notes: Phase 1b Aramchol + Stivarga (regorafenib) in refractory mCRC, starting VCU Massey early 2026. Expansion cohort with metformin. Preclinical: 3-drug combo showed synergistic tumor killing in vitro + in vivo. Competes in 3L+ setting where Stivarga is standard (modest benefit). Galmed filed new combo patents US 63/786,370 and 63/915,832. Aramchol is SCD1 inhibitor — hypothesis is that SCD1 blockade reshapes tumor lipid metabolism to sensitize cells to kinase inhibitor + metformin. Highly speculative — no human data yet.

assets.name: Aramchol — HCC (same Phase 1b)
assets.stage: Phase 1b early 2026 (dose escalation shared with mCRC)

market.notes: Part of same Phase 1b basket trial at VCU Massey. HCC is historically high-unmet-need setting; Aramchol's liver biology is theoretically favorable vs other tumor types. SCD1 high in HCC per preclinical. Regorafenib approved in 2L HCC post-sorafenib.

market.notes: Rare biliary tract cancer, ~8K US cases/year. Part of same VCU Massey Phase 1b basket. Small population but high unmet need — limited 2L+ options. Orphan drug potential if signal seen. Most speculative arm of the trial.

assets.name: Aramchol brain-penetrant LNP — Parkinson's disease
assets.stage: Preclinical → Phase 1b/2 PoC planned H2 2026 (subject to regulatory advice)

market.notes: New brain-penetrant LNP formulation co-developed with Barcode Nanotech announced April 9 2026. Subcutaneous delivery, crosses BBB, targets α-synuclein aggregation. In vitro: dose-dependent reduction of α-synuclein aggregation. Planned Phase 1b/2 PoC in Parkinson disease patients H2 2026, subject to regulatory advice (material caveat — not FDA-approved yet). Also theoretically applicable to MSA, DLB, PAF. First-in-class MoA for synucleinopathies — the entire thesis depends on whether SCD1 blockade actually disrupts α-synuclein pathology in humans.

row.patientsK.note: Auto-decomposed. ROW ~42% -- dominant in large-market diseases.

penPct.note: Peak penetration inherited from legacy config -- refine per competitive landscape.

assets.name: Aramchol — NASH/MASH (legacy Phase 3 ARMOR)
assets.stage: ARMOR Phase 3 program — essentially dormant, combination-only strategy

market.notes: Galmed's historical flagship. Aramchol monotherapy Phase 3 ARMOR failed to meet primary endpoints. Company now positions Aramchol as COMBINATION therapy for NASH — pairing with Gannex ASC41 (THR-beta agonist) and other mechanisms. Given Rezdiffra (Madrigal) is approved FDA 2024 and dominates the MASH market, Aramchol's NASH future is marginal at best. Research collaboration with MyBiotics for microbiome-response biomarker. Patent extension granted to 2039. Optionality only — effectively written off.

mega_bear.narrative: All pivots fail + Nasdaq delisting + reverse split or wind-down
events: ✗ Phase 1b GI oncology shows no signal — combo hypothesis wrong
✗ Parkinson's trial never starts (regulatory or financing issue)
✗ Nasdaq minimum bid price deficiency not cured — delisted to OTC
→ Reverse split 1:10+, stock grinds toward zero, cash depleted by 2027

bear.narrative: Dilution + slow progress + pivots advance but no conviction data
events: ~ Phase 1b GI onco reads safety only, no efficacy signal
~ Parkinson's trial starts but slow enrollment
~ Company raises capital at sub-$1 via ATM or private placement
→ Muddles through 2026-27, cash burns down, stock range $0.50-1.50

base.narrative: Phase 1b GI onco shows early signal + Parkinson's trial starts — speculative micro-cap stabilizes
events: ~ Phase 1b Aramchol+regorafenib shows one or two partial responses
✓ Parkinson Ph1b/2 initiates on time H2 2026 — first-in-class data catalyst 2027
~ Nasdaq compliance cured via reverse split
→ Stock $1.50-3 on validation optionality

bull.narrative: GI onco signal + Parkinson's PoC works + re-rating from broken to promising

✓ Parkinson Ph1b/2 initiates + biomarker signal in α-synuclein
✓ Licensing discussions with oncology or neuro partner
✓ Stock $3-6 on real data de-risking

events: ✓ Aramchol becomes validated oncology + Parkinson's asset
✓ Licensing deal or buyout at $30-50M pre-clinical valuation

lastData.title: Tel Aviv University brain mets collab announced; brain-penetrant LNP unveiled April 9
points: Apr 14 2026: Collaboration agreement with Tel Aviv University to evaluate Aramchol for metastatic brain cancers
Apr 9 2026: Brain-penetrant Aramchol LNP formulation unveiled (Barcode Nanotech co-development)
Parkinson Phase 1b/2 PoC trial planned H2 2026, subject to regulatory advice
Phase 1b GI oncology combo (Aramchol + Stivarga + metformin) at VCU Massey starting early 2026
Indications: metastatic CRC, HCC, cholangiocarcinoma; expansion cohort with metformin
Nov 2025: Preclinical 3-drug combo data — synergistic GI tumor killing
Jan 30 2026: Nasdaq minimum bid price deficiency notification (180-day cure period)
Amilo-5MER Phase 1 healthy volunteer trial ongoing (Hebrew University collaboration)
ARMOR Phase 3 in NASH essentially dormant — company now pursues combination-only NASH strategy
Gannex ASC41 (THR-beta) + Aramchol combination research agreement
MyBiotics microbiome collaboration for NASH biomarkers
Patent estate extended to 2039 with new combo patents filed Nov 2025

nextCatalyst.title: Phase 1b GI oncology first patient dosed + Parkinson Ph1b/2 initiation
thresholds: First safety/DLT data from GI oncology Phase 1b (mid-2026)
Parkinson Ph1b/2 trial initiation (H2 2026) — subject to regulatory advice
Nasdaq minimum bid price compliance deadline (180 days from Jan 30 notice = late July 2026)

risks: Broken micro-cap with ~$7M mcap — outside institutional mandate entirely
Nasdaq delisting risk — stock $1.04 vs $1.00 minimum; 180-day cure ends ~late July 2026
Reverse split probable — dilutive to holders, often followed by further decline
ARMOR Phase 3 NASH failure is historical record — management credibility damaged
Aramchol monotherapy never demonstrated meaningful NASH efficacy — combo pivot is thesis repair
5-6 employees — effectively a research shell with licensing agreements
All pipeline indications are speculative — no proof-of-concept in humans for oncology or PD
Brain-penetrant LNP is preclinical only — 18-24 months from real data
Annual burn ~$5M against $15-20M cash = runway into 2027, tight
Cholangiocarcinoma + HCC + CRC basket design in Phase 1b dilutes statistical power per arm
No options market — microcap illiquid, bid-ask spreads wide
Dilution risk acute — ATM or private placement likely needed in 2026
Company has pivoted 3+ times (NASH → GI oncology → Parkinson's → brain mets) in ~18 months, suggesting scientific narrative-chasing rather than conviction
Israel-based with tiny US float — geopolitical and currency overlay

catalysts.title: Phase 1b VCU Massey GI oncology trial first patient dosed
